# Confii-Go

> Complete configuration management library for Go. Full lifecycle: load, merge, validate, resolve secrets, track sources, detect drift, version, and rollback — from any source.

Confii loads, merges, validates, and manages configuration from YAML, JSON, TOML, INI, .env files, environment variables, HTTP endpoints, and cloud stores (AWS S3, SSM, Azure Blob, GCS, IBM COS, Git) — with deep merging, secret resolution, source tracking, and type-safe generics.

## Key Facts

- Language: Go
- Module: github.com/confiify/confii-go
- License: MIT
- Minimum Go version: 1.25+
- Thread-safe: Yes (sync.RWMutex, concurrent reads, serialized writes)
- Global state: None (all state lives in Config[T] instances)
- Repository: https://github.com/confiify/confii-go
- Documentation: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/confiify/confii-go

## What Makes Confii Different

Confii provides:

- Type-safe generics: Config[T] with cfg.Typed() returning *T with IDE autocomplete
- 6 merge strategies (replace, merge, append, prepend, intersection, union) with per-path overrides
- ${secret:key} placeholder resolution from AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, GCP Secret Manager, HashiCorp Vault (9 auth methods) — with caching, TTL, and multi-store fallback
- Hydra-style config composition via _include and _defaults directives with cycle detection
- Environment resolution: automatic default + production/staging section merging
- 4-type hook system (key, value, condition, global) for value transformation on access
- Full introspection: Explain(), Layers(), Schema(), source tracking, override history, conflict detection
- Config diff, drift detection from intended baselines
- Config versioning with snapshot, compare, and rollback
- File watching with incremental reload (mtime + SHA256 change detection)
- Observability: access metrics, event emission, top-accessed keys
- Documentation generation (markdown, JSON) from live config
- 10-command CLI tool: load, get, validate, export, diff, debug, explain, lint, docs, migrate
- Self-configuration via .confii.yaml auto-discovery with 3-tier priority
- Builder pattern with fluent API

## Installation

```bash
go get github.com/confiify/confii-go
```

Cloud providers are opt-in via build tags:

```bash
go build -tags aws          # S3, SSM, Secrets Manager
go build -tags azure        # Blob Storage, Key Vault
go build -tags gcp          # Cloud Storage, Secret Manager
go build -tags vault        # HashiCorp Vault
go build -tags ibm          # IBM Cloud Object Storage
go build -tags "aws,azure,gcp,vault,ibm"  # all
```

## Quick Start

### Basic usage

```go
cfg, err := confii.New[any](context.Background(),
    confii.WithLoaders(
        loader.NewYAML("config.yaml"),
        loader.NewEnvironment("APP"),
    ),
    confii.WithEnv("production"),
)

host, _ := cfg.Get("database.host")
port := cfg.GetIntOr("database.port", 5432)
debug := cfg.GetBoolOr("debug", false)
```

### Type-safe access with generics

```go
type AppConfig struct {
    Database struct {
        Host string `mapstructure:"host" validate:"required"`
        Port int    `mapstructure:"port" validate:"required,min=1,max=65535"`
    } `mapstructure:"database"`
    Debug bool `mapstructure:"debug"`
}

cfg, err := confii.New[AppConfig](ctx,
    confii.WithLoaders(loader.NewYAML("config.yaml")),
    confii.WithValidateOnLoad(true),
)

model, _ := cfg.Typed()
fmt.Println(model.Database.Host) // IDE autocomplete works
```

### Builder pattern

```go
cfg, err := confii.NewBuilder[AppConfig]().
    WithEnv("production").
    AddLoader(loader.NewYAML("base.yaml")).
    AddLoader(loader.NewYAML("prod.yaml")).
    EnableFreezeOnLoad().
    Build(ctx)
```

## Configuration Sources

| Source | Constructor | Build Tag |
| --- | --- | --- |
| YAML | loader.NewYAML(path) | - |
| JSON | loader.NewJSON(path) | - |
| TOML | loader.NewTOML(path) | - |
| INI | loader.NewINI(path) | - |
| .env | loader.NewEnvFile(path) | - |
| Environment vars | loader.NewEnvironment(prefix) | - |
| HTTP/HTTPS | loader.NewHTTP(url, opts...) | - |
| AWS S3 | cloud.NewS3(url, opts...) | aws |
| AWS SSM | cloud.NewSSM(prefix) | aws |
| Azure Blob | cloud.NewAzureBlob(container, blob) | azure |
| GCS | cloud.NewGCS(bucket, object) | gcp |
| IBM COS | cloud.NewIBMCOS(...) | ibm |
| Git repo | cloud.NewGit(repo, path, opts...) | - |

## Constructor Options

| Option | Purpose | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| WithLoaders(loaders...) | Set configuration sources | none |
| WithEnv(name) | Set active environment | "" |
| WithEnvSwitcher(envVar) | Read environment name from OS variable | none |
| WithEnvPrefix(prefix) | Auto-add EnvironmentLoader | none |
| WithDeepMerge(bool) | Enable recursive merge | true |
| WithMergeStrategyOption(strategy) | Default merge strategy | Merge |
| WithMergeStrategyMap(map) | Per-path merge overrides | none |
| WithValidateOnLoad(bool) | Validate struct tags after loading | false |
| WithStrictValidation(bool) | Treat warnings as errors | false |
| WithSchema(schema) / WithSchemaPath(path) | JSON Schema validation | none |
| WithEnvExpander(bool) | Enable ${VAR} expansion | false |
| WithTypeCasting(bool) | Auto-convert strings | false |
| WithSysenvFallback(bool) | Fall back to OS env vars | false |
| WithDynamicReloading(bool) | Enable fsnotify file watching | false |
| WithFreezeOnLoad(bool) | Make immutable after load | false |
| WithDebugMode(bool) | Enable source tracking | false |
| WithOnError(policy) | ErrorPolicyRaise, Warn, or Ignore | Raise |
| WithLogger(logger) | Custom *slog.Logger | default |

## Config[T] API

### Access methods

```go
cfg.Get("key.path")                    // (any, error)
cfg.GetOr("key.path", defaultVal)      // any
cfg.GetString("key") / GetStringOr()   // (string, error) / string
cfg.GetInt("key") / GetIntOr()         // (int, error) / int
cfg.GetBool("key") / GetBoolOr()       // (bool, error) / bool
cfg.GetFloat64("key") / GetFloat64Or() // (float64, error) / float64
cfg.MustGet("key")                     // any (panics on error)
cfg.Has("key")                         // bool
cfg.Keys() / cfg.Keys("prefix")       // []string
cfg.ToDict()                           // map[string]any
cfg.Typed()                            // (*T, error)
```

### Mutation methods

```go
cfg.Set("key", "value")                          // set value
cfg.Set("key", "val", confii.WithOverride(false)) // errors if key exists
cfg.Freeze() / cfg.IsFrozen()                     // make immutable
cfg.Override(overrides) // (restore func(), error) // scoped override
```

### Lifecycle methods

```go
cfg.Reload(ctx)                                // full reload
cfg.Reload(ctx, confii.WithIncremental(true))  // only changed files
cfg.Reload(ctx, confii.WithDryRun(true))       // validate without applying
cfg.Extend(ctx, loader)                        // add source at runtime
cfg.OnChange(func(key string, old, new any))   // change callback
cfg.StopWatching()                             // stop file watcher
```

### Introspection methods

```go
cfg.Explain("key")                // value, source, override count, full history
cfg.Schema("key")                 // type info
cfg.Layers()                      // source stack
cfg.GetSourceInfo("key")          // SourceInfo struct
cfg.GetOverrideHistory("key")     // []OverrideEntry
cfg.GetConflicts()                // all overridden keys
cfg.GetSourceStatistics()         // stats per source
cfg.FindKeysFromSource("file")    // keys from specific source
cfg.PrintDebugInfo("key")         // human-readable report
cfg.ExportDebugReport("out.json") // full JSON export
cfg.GenerateDocs("markdown")      // documentation generation
```

### Diff, versioning, and observability

```go
cfg.Diff(otherCfg)                 // []ConfigDiff
cfg.DetectDrift(intendedMap)       // []ConfigDiff
cfg.EnableObservability()          // *Metrics
cfg.EnableEvents()                 // *EventEmitter
cfg.EnableVersioning(path, max)    // *VersionManager
cfg.SaveVersion(metadata)         // (*Version, error)
cfg.RollbackToVersion(id)         // error
cfg.GetMetrics()                   // map[string]any
cfg.Export("json") / ("yaml") / ("toml") // ([]byte, error)
```

## Secret Management

```go
// Built-in stores
secret.NewDictStore(map[string]any{...})   // in-memory (dev/test)
secret.NewEnvStore(opts...)                // OS environment variables
secret.NewMultiStore([]SecretStore{...})   // fallback chain

// Cloud stores (build-tag gated)
cloud.NewAWSSecretsManager(ctx, opts...)   // aws
cloud.NewHashiCorpVault(opts...)           // vault (9 auth methods)
cloud.NewAzureKeyVault(url, cred)          // azure
cloud.NewGCPSecretManager(ctx, project)    // gcp

// Wire up
resolver := secret.NewResolver(store, secret.WithCache(true), secret.WithCacheTTL(5*time.Minute))
cfg.HookProcessor().RegisterGlobalHook(resolver.Hook())
// ${secret:key}, ${secret:key:json_path}, ${secret:key:json_path:version}
```

## Package Structure

```
github.com/confiify/confii-go/
  config.go              Config[T] — core type with all methods
  builder.go             Fluent builder API
  errors.go              Sentinel errors + ConfigError
  loader/                File & env loaders (YAML, JSON, TOML, INI, .env, HTTP)
    cloud/               Cloud loaders (S3, SSM, Azure Blob, GCS, IBM COS, Git)
  secret/                Secret stores (env, dict, multi) + resolver
    cloud/               Cloud secret stores (AWS, Azure, GCP, Vault)
  merge/                 Merge strategies (default + advanced with per-path overrides)
  compose/               Configuration composition (_include, _defaults)
  envhandler/            Environment resolution (default + env sections)
  hook/                  Hook processor (4 types: key, value, condition, global)
  validate/              Struct tag + JSON Schema validation
  observe/               Metrics, events, versioning with rollback
  diff/                  Diff + drift detection
  sourcetrack/           Per-key source tracking, override history
  watch/                 File watching (fsnotify)
  export/                JSON, YAML, TOML exporters
  selfconfig/            Self-configuration reader (.confii.yaml)
  examples/              19 runnable examples
  confii/                CLI tool (10 commands)
```

## CLI Tool

```bash
go install github.com/confiify/confii-go/confii@latest

confii load production -l yaml:config.yaml
confii get production database.host -l yaml:config.yaml
confii export production -l yaml:config.yaml -f json -o config.json
confii validate production -l yaml:config.yaml --schema schema.json
confii diff dev production --loader1 yaml:c.yaml --loader2 yaml:c.yaml
confii explain production -l yaml:config.yaml --key database.host
confii lint production -l yaml:config.yaml --strict
confii docs production -l yaml:config.yaml -f markdown -o DOCS.md
confii migrate dotenv .env -o config.yaml
```

## When to Use Confii

Confii is designed for projects that need more than just loading config files:

- Secret resolution from cloud stores with ${secret:key} placeholders
- Config drift detection and versioning with rollback
- Full introspection: know where every value came from and why
- Per-path merge strategies across multiple config sources
- Type-safe generics with Config[T] and compile-time safety
- Thread-safe concurrent access with zero global state
- Production observability: access metrics, change events, debug reports

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/confiify/confii-go
- Package docs: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/confiify/confii-go
- Examples: https://github.com/confiify/confii-go/tree/main/examples
- Issues: https://github.com/confiify/confii-go/issues
